assignment.objective: Implement a bounded browser-first GGUF Anatomy slice with explicit native-runtime exclusions.
assignment.selected_reason: The orchestrator marked the trace viewer and deterministic fixture dependencies as evidenced before this slice began.

outputs.reason: The initial import path failed during CI discovery and was corrected without changing parser logic.

failures.summary: The builder could not resolve its sibling fixture-generator module until scripts was added to the import path.

decisions: Independent GGUF and llama.cpp correctness review remains required before technical correctness claims.

claims.label: Verified
claims.statement: The browser payload agrees with the deterministic Python golden parser for the bounded synthetic fixture.

claims.label: Interpretation
claims.statement: Predict-Discover-Explain checkpoints may help expose misconceptions about graph storage and page residency.

claims.label: Open Question
claims.statement: Learner benefit and independent technical correctness remain unevidenced.
